pathfinding.title: Pathfinding
pathfinding.paragraph: When active, Anyfinder attempts to find the shortest path while dragging a token.

togglePathfinding.name: Toggle Anyfinder Pathfinding
togglePathfinding.hint: Toggles your personal Anyfinder pathfinding preference without opening token controls.

notifications.pathfindingUserOn: Anyfinder personal pathfinding preference is now ON.
notifications.pathfindingUserOff: Anyfinder personal pathfinding preference is now OFF.
notifications.pathfindingGlobalForceNote: World setting "Force Pathfinding for All Players" is active, so effective pathfinding remains ON.

forcePathfindingAllPlayers.name: Force Pathfinding for All Players
forcePathfindingAllPlayers.hint: Global switch that keeps pathfinding enabled for all players.

fogExploration.name: Fog Exploration Restriction
fogExploration.hint: When enabled, Anyfinder is limited to map areas currently explored by the user.

debugMode.name: Debug Mode
debugMode.hint: Master debug switch. Enables technical Anyfinder logs and automatic gridless trace capture.

debugLogMode.name: Debug Log Detail Level
debugLogMode.hint: Controls how much debug information is printed to console. Use Compact for shareable diagnostics, Full for deep investigation.

gridlessAllowSqueeze.name: Gridless Squeeze Leeway
gridlessAllowSqueeze.hint: Allow a configurable amount of token clipping against walls when finding gridless routes.

gridlessSqueezeLeewayPx.name: Gridless Leeway (px)
gridlessSqueezeLeewayPx.hint: How many pixels of token collision radius may be reduced for squeeze routing. Effective clearance is still clamped by minimum center clearance.

gridlessMinCenterClearancePx.name: Gridless Minimum Center Clearance (px)
gridlessMinCenterClearancePx.hint: Minimum wall distance kept for token center collision in gridless routing, even when squeeze leeway is high.

gridlessExactFitTolerancePx.name: Gridless Exact-Fit Tolerance (px)
gridlessExactFitTolerancePx.hint: Small collision tolerance used for near-tangent passages. Helps exact token-width corridors route without edge-sticking from precision artifacts.

gridlessNodeStepPx.name: Gridless Node Step (px)
gridlessNodeStepPx.hint: Sampling step for gridless path routing. Lower values improve route quality but cost more performance.

gridlessDebugMaxTraces.name: Gridless Debug Trace Limit
gridlessDebugMaxTraces.hint: Maximum number of debug traces stored in memory for `anyfinderDebugGetTraces()`.
